message: You know those moments when you feel a tiny bit smug because you were prepared? Last week, my neighbor was scrambling to find a flashlight during a surprise power outage, while I was sitting pretty with my go-bag packed in the corner, complete with batteries and snacks. I couldn't help but think, "I told you so!" It’s funny how those little things can make such a difference in a pinch. It’s not about being alarmist; it’s just about peace of mind! Have you ever had a moment like that? What’s in your go-bag?
